title: Zhang Bin, deputy director of the Municipal Human Resources and Social Security Bureau, led a team to have an in-depth understanding of Tianhui Group’s solution to talent needs
contentHtml: On July 21, Zhang Bin, deputy director of Qinhuangdao Municipal Human Resources and Social Security Bureau, led a team to visit Tianhui Group to gain an in-depth understanding of the company’s talent needs. Group Chairman Zeng Shengwen, President Du Shuang, Finance Director Jiang Sheng, and senior executives of the Human Resources Department accompanied the reception. Director Zhang Bin and his delegation first learned in detail about the current key projects operated by Tianhui Group, and put forward guiding opinions and suggestions on the demand for high-tech talents during the operation of each project. It gave affirmation and support to the Tianhui E-commerce Logistics Park project. By then, the project canProvide more than 1000employmentpost, attracting a large number of highly sophisticated talents to settle in Qinhuangdao.
titleZh: 市人力资源和社会保障局副局长张斌带队深入了解天晖集团解决人才需求
contentHtmlZh: 7月21日，秦皇岛市人力资源和社会保障局副局长张斌带队莅临天晖集团，深度了解企业人才需求。集团董事长曾胜文、总裁杜霜、财务部总监姜晟、人力资源部高管陪同接待。张斌局长一行首先详细了解天晖集团目前运营重点项目，并针对各项目运营过程中高科技人才需求提出了指导性的意见和建议。对于天晖电商物流园项目给予了肯定和支持，届时该项目可提供1000个以上的就业岗位，吸引大批高精尖人才驻足秦皇岛。
